body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
**First commit:** Updates the default land model to use the defaults from snowy_land_pmodel.jl:
- Pmodel conductance and photosynthesis
- piecewise soil moisture stress
- snow albedo depends on zenith angle
- snow cover fraction with resolution read from domain

**Second commit:**
After making the first change^, the unit tests on GPU on central did not pass because of a parameter memory bug. This was because of the pmodel `update_photosynthesis!` call. After talking with @dennisYatunin, we determined it was the large number of stacked lazy operations. To address this, I created a pointwise function which does all of the computation for `update_photosynthesis!`. At the same time, it was convenient to make the cache variable a field of tuples, rather than 4 fields separately. Therefore, we stored GPP, An, Rd, and ci differently between the pmodel vs Farquhar photosynthesis. In one case, it is p.canopy.photosynthesis.InstVars, in the other, the 4 separately. Because of this, it was helpful to make additional "get" functions for these quantities. 

This seems to improve performance: the canopy model test on GPU went from 4 minutes to 2.5 minutes, and ozark_pmodel went from taking 199 seconds to 165 seconds. 

Note that Farquhar photosynthesis already calls a single pointwise function.

labels.description: Add this label to run benchmarks on clima
